failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch call by omitting item_id and passing product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string product_id 1808611083.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to check item 1096508426 for product 1808611083 using ProductCatalogSearch. All required IDs were available from the start. At index 2, the Researcher produced a concrete tool invocation payload, but used {"product_id": 0}, omitting the required item_id and using the wrong product_id type/value. The next step confirms a SchemaError: the tool requires string product_id and item_id. This is not a network, access, or guardrail issue.
